steps.t: The Forest Gate can be found at the eastern edge of the Beorning-lands where the Vale of Anduin meets Eryn Lasgalen. You should travel to the Forest G…
Legolas can be found at the Forest Gate at the eastern edge of the Beorning-lands. You should tell Legolas of Grimbeorn's decision.
Legolas can be found at the Beorninghús in the Beorning-lands. You should talk to Legolas.
